expectations.text: Identifies legacy std/http serve usage as incompatible and recommends or applies Deno.serve migration.
expectations.evidence: Lines 14-28 show legacy serve replacement with Deno.serve.

expectations.text: Identifies deployctl as sunset and recommends new Deploy GitHub integration or deno deploy.
expectations.evidence: Lines 28 and 47 identify deployctl as sunset and recommend GitHub integration or deno deploy.

expectations.text: Identifies Deno.Kv.enqueue or listenQueue as unsupported on new Deploy.
expectations.evidence: Line 46 identifies Deno.Kv.enqueue and listenQueue as unsupported.

expectations.text: Does not invent a queue replacement without marking product or infrastructure choices as blockers.
expectations.evidence: Line 46 says replacement needs a product/infrastructure choice and cannot be invented without real semantics.
